recipientAddress.description: YOUR Solana wallet address (base58) — where payments settle. Public key only; the skill never holds custody. Required.

priceUsdc.description: Default price per request in USDC. Default: 0.01.

requireOnChain.description: If true, a payment is accepted only after its transaction is confirmed settled on Solana (revenue-grade). Default: false (structural check only).

rpcUrl.description: Optional Solana RPC URL override for on-chain confirmation.
